title: Roepera fuscata

The classification of Roepera fuscata is consistent with its botanical nomenclature.

intro: Roepera fuscata, also known as the shrubby daisy or red shrub, is a small shrub native to southern Africa, characterized by its daisy-like white flowers and dark green foliage.
